name: Bolivar (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the wealth and sovereignty of the territory
the hope and fertility of the land
the blood shed by the patriots in the wars of independence

description: Three equal horizontal stripes of yellow, green, and red.
history: The department is named after Simon Bolivar; the flag's yellow-green-red horizontal stripes echo Bolivar's Greater Colombia tricolour, with green substituted for the central blue.

features.symbolism: the colours of Greater Colombia in honour of Simon Bolivar, after whom the department is named
